label: FVE Config
info: Konfigurace FVE automatizace - parametry a inicializace

name: Nastav konfiguraci
Zpracuj ceny
Aktualizuj stav
Zpracuj HA stavy
Parametry z dashboardu (override)
func:
// Override fve_config hodnotami z HA dashboard entit (cfg_*).
// Default z "Nastav konfiguraci" zustava jako fallback. Generovano (vetev parameters).
var PARAM_MAP = {
    "input_number.cfg_max_daily_soc": "max_daily_soc",
    "input_number.cfg_daily_consumption_kwh": "daily_consumption_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_safety_margin_w": "safety_margin_w",
    "input_number.cfg_charger_max_amper": "charger_max_amper",
    "input_number.cfg_charger_faze": "charger_faze",
    "input_number.cfg_sit_napeti": "sit_napeti",
    "input_number.cfg_nabijeni_auta_forecast_kwh": "nabijeni_auta_forecast_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_nabijeni_auta_min_soc": "nabijeni_auta_min_soc",
    "input_number.cfg_nabijeni_auta_solar_w": "nabijeni_auta_solar_w",
    "input_number.cfg_nabijeni_auta_cena_prah_vyssi": "nabijeni_auta_cena_prah_vyssi",
    "input_number.cfg_nabijeni_auta_cena_prah_nizsi": "nabijeni_auta_cena_prah_nizsi",
    "input_number.cfg_nabijeni_auta_min_soc_slunce": "nabijeni_auta_min_soc_slunce",
    "input_number.cfg_nabijeni_auta_pretizeni_w": "nabijeni_auta_pretizeni_w",
    "input_number.cfg_nabijeni_auta_soc_drain_prah": "nabijeni_auta_soc_drain_prah",
    "input_number.cfg_nabijeni_auta_soc_drain_w": "nabijeni_auta_soc_drain_w",
    "input_number.cfg_nabijeni_auta_max_sell_price": "nabijeni_auta_max_sell_price",
    "input_number.cfg_nabijeni_auta_soc_charge_w": "nabijeni_auta_soc_charge_w",
    "input_number.cfg_nabijeni_auta_target_batt_w": "nabijeni_auta_target_batt_w",
    "input_number.cfg_prah_levna_energie": "prah_levna_energie",
    "input_number.cfg_prah_draha_energie": "prah_draha_energie",
    "input_number.cfg_prah_ultra_levna_nakup": "prah_ultra_levna_nakup",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_nocni_snizeni": "topeni_nocni_snizeni",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_nocni_od": "topeni_nocni_od",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_nocni_do": "topeni_nocni_do",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_nouzova_teplota": "topeni_nouzova_teplota",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_min_teplota_nadrze": "topeni_min_teplota_nadrze",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_bezpecny_pokles": "topeni_bezpecny_pokles",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_hystereze_chlazeni": "topeni_hystereze_chlazeni",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_solar_forecast_kwh": "topeni_solar_forecast_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_solar_high_day_kwh": "topeni_solar_high_day_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_plan_aggressive_solar_day_kwh": "plan_aggressive_solar_day_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_plan_aggressive_soc_pct": "plan_aggressive_soc_pct",
    "input_number.cfg_plan_aggressive_remaining_solar_kwh": "plan_aggressive_remaining_solar_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_plan_auto_demand_kwh": "plan_auto_demand_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_plan_sell_min_tesla_soc": "plan_sell_min_tesla_soc",
    "input_number.cfg_plan_solar_insufficient_threshold_kwh": "plan_solar_insufficient_threshold_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_plan_letni_min_solar_kwh": "plan_letni_min_solar_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_plan_solar_sell_threshold_kwh": "plan_solar_sell_threshold_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_solar_override_w": "topeni_solar_override_w",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_solar_defer_margin": "topeni_solar_defer_margin",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_final_solar_kwh": "topeni_final_solar_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_final_hours": "topeni_final_hours",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_solar_margin_hours": "topeni_solar_margin_hours",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_zakaz_pretok_defer_max_sol_kwh": "topeni_zakaz_pretok_defer_max_sol_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_zakaz_pretok_defer_safe_margin_extra": "topeni_zakaz_pretok_defer_safe_margin_extra",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_auto_rezim_indoor_gap": "topeni_auto_rezim_indoor_gap",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_auto_rezim_indoor_min_minut": "topeni_auto_rezim_indoor_min_minut",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_auto_rezim_outdoor_now_zima": "topeni_auto_rezim_outdoor_now_zima",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_auto_rezim_outdoor_max_24h": "topeni_auto_rezim_outdoor_max_24h",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_auto_rezim_outdoor_now_leto": "topeni_auto_rezim_outdoor_now_leto",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_auto_rezim_outdoor_min_48h": "topeni_auto_rezim_outdoor_min_48h",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_auto_rezim_manual_override_h": "topeni_auto_rezim_manual_override_h",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_auto_rezim_anti_flap_h": "topeni_auto_rezim_anti_flap_h",
    "input_number.cfg_nibe_peak_w": "nibe_peak_w",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_min_pretok_patron_w": "topeni_min_pretok_patron_w",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_patron_faze_w": "topeni_patron_faze_w",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_min_soc_patron": "topeni_min_soc_patron",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_patron_max_grid_draw_w": "topeni_patron_max_grid_draw_w",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_patron_max_sell_price": "topeni_patron_max_sell_price",
    "input_number.cfg_chlazeni_nocni_hystereze_c": "chlazeni_nocni_hystereze_c",
    "input_number.cfg_chlazeni_predchlazeni_offset_c": "chlazeni_predchlazeni_offset_c",
    "input_number.cfg_chlazeni_predchlazeni_min_solar_w": "chlazeni_predchlazeni_min_solar_w",
    "input_number.cfg_chlazeni_spotreba_kwh_h": "chlazeni_spotreba_kwh_h",
    "input_number.cfg_sell_correction_max_kwh": "sell_correction_max_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_sell_correction_decay_kwh": "sell_correction_decay_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_sell_correction_night_buy_prah_kwh": "sell_correction_night_buy_prah_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_prah_nevyhodneho_prodeje_kc": "prah_nevyhodneho_prodeje_kc",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_boost_max_sell_price": "topeni_boost_max_sell_price",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_patron_min_solar_w": "topeni_patron_min_solar_w",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_patron_drain_soc_prah": "topeni_patron_drain_soc_prah",
    "input_number.cfg_posledni_solarni_hodiny": "posledni_solarni_hodiny",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_dump_solar_soc": "topeni_dump_solar_soc",
    "input_number.cfg_topeni_chladna_nadrz": "topeni_chladna_nadrz",
    "input_number.cfg_filtrace_surplus_on_w": "filtrace_surplus_on_w",
    "input_number.cfg_filtrace_surplus_off_w": "filtrace_surplus_off_w",
    "input_number.cfg_filtrace_pool_temp_min": "filtrace_pool_temp_min",
    "input_number.cfg_filtrace_pool_temp_threshold_c": "filtrace_pool_temp_threshold_c",
    "input_number.cfg_filtrace_pool_temp_hysterese_c": "filtrace_pool_temp_hysterese_c",
    "input_number.cfg_filtrace_min_studena_min": "filtrace_min_studena_min",
    "input_number.cfg_filtrace_min_tepla_min": "filtrace_min_tepla_min",
    "input_number.cfg_filtrace_deadline_h": "filtrace_deadline_h",
    "input_number.cfg_filtrace_anti_cycle_min": "filtrace_anti_cycle_min",
    "input_number.cfg_filtrace_soc_low": "filtrace_soc_low",
    "input_number.cfg_filtrace_solar_ok_kwh": "filtrace_solar_ok_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_filtrace_min_run_min": "filtrace_min_run_min",
    "input_number.cfg_pool_ventil_start_c": "pool_ventil_start_c",
    "input_number.cfg_pool_nibe_min_runtime_sec": "pool_nibe_min_runtime_sec",
    "input_number.cfg_pool_nibe_plan_horizon_h": "pool_nibe_plan_horizon_h",
    "input_number.cfg_pool_nibe_zaporna_cena_threshold": "pool_nibe_zaporna_cena_threshold",
    "input_number.cfg_min_vybijeni_blokace_w": "min_vybijeni_blokace_w",
    "input_number.cfg_setrit_grid_bias_w": "setrit_grid_bias_w",
    "input_number.cfg_zaporna_psp_max_w": "zaporna_psp_max_w",
    "input_number.cfg_zaporna_nibe_reserve_w": "zaporna_nibe_reserve_w",
    "input_number.cfg_zaporna_flex_reserve_w": "zaporna_flex_reserve_w",
    "input_number.cfg_zaporna_prah_critical_w": "zaporna_prah_critical_w",
    "input_number.cfg_zaporna_prah_safe_w": "zaporna_prah_safe_w",
    "input_number.cfg_zaporna_prah_emergency_w": "zaporna_prah_emergency_w",
    "input_number.cfg_min_export_advantage_czk": "min_export_advantage_czk",
    "input_number.cfg_zaporna_psp_boost_w": "zaporna_psp_boost_w",
    "input_number.cfg_zaporna_bat_max_discharge_w": "zaporna_bat_max_discharge_w",
    "input_number.cfg_plan_horizon_hours": "plan_horizon_hours",
    "input_number.cfg_balancing_force_stop_hours": "balancing_force_stop_hours",
    "input_number.cfg_balancing_interval_days": "balancing_interval_days",
    "input_number.cfg_balancing_min_solar_kwh": "balancing_min_solar_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_balancing_grid_reserve_w": "balancing_grid_reserve_w",
    "input_number.cfg_night_target_soc_margin": "night_target_soc_margin",
    "input_number.cfg_night_reserve_kwh": "night_reserve_kwh",
    "input_number.cfg_min_arbitrage_profit_czk": "min_arbitrage_profit_czk",
    "input_number.cfg_min_sell_profit_czk": "min_sell_profit_czk",
    "input_number.cfg_rychle_nabit_deadline_h": "rychle_nabit_deadline_h",
    "input_boolean.cfg_sell_correction_enabled": ["sell_correction_enabled", true],
    "input_boolean.cfg_prodej_misto_nabijeni_enabled": ["prodej_misto_nabijeni_enabled", true]
};
var config = global.get("fve_config") || {};
var n = 0;
for (var eid in PARAM_MAP) {
    var spec = PARAM_MAP[eid];
    var st = global.get("homeassistant.homeAssistant.states['" + eid + "']");
    if (!st || st.state === undefined || st.state === null) continue;
    var sv = String(st.state);
    if (sv === "unavailable" || sv === "unknown" || sv === "") continue;
    if (Array.isArray(spec)) { config[spec[0]] = (sv === "on"); }
    else { var v = parseFloat(sv); if (!isNaN(v)) config[spec] = v; }
    n++;
}
global.set("fve_config", config);
if (config.max_spotreba_sit_w !== undefined) global.set("max_spotreba_sit", config.max_spotreba_sit_w);
node.status({ fill: "green", shape: "dot", text: "Dashboard override: " + n + " param" });
return msg;
